name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP)
eligibility: Students from Class 1 to PhD (different categories)
benefits: Covers tuition fees, living expenses, exam fees.

name: Prime Minister’s Scholarship Scheme (PMSS)
eligibility: Children of Ex-Servicemen / CAPF & Assam Rifles personnel

name: AICTE Pragati Scholarship for Girls
benefits: ₹50,000 per annum for tuition and other expenses

name: Post-Matric Scholarship (SC/ST/OBC)
eligibility: Students belonging to SC/ST/OBC categories after Class 10
benefits: Maintenance allowance, tuition fee, other allowances

name: AICTE Saksham Scholarship
benefits: ₹50,000 per year for tuition and related expenses.

name: INSPIRE Scholarship (DST)
eligibility: Top 1% students in Class 12 Science or JEE/KVPY rank holders
benefits: ₹80,000 per year for higher education in Science.

name: JN Tata Endowment Loan Scholarship
eligibility: Indian students pursuing higher studies abroad

name: Aditya Birla Scholarship
eligibility: Students of IITs, IIMs, BITS Pilani, XLRI

name: Reliance Foundation Scholarships
eligibility: UG/PG students in AI, Computer Science, Math, Science

name: HDFC Educational Crisis Scholarship
eligibility: Students from Class 6 to UG/PG facing sudden financial crisis
benefits: ₹10,000 to ₹25,000 per year towards tuition and academic expenses.

name: Azim Premji Foundation Fellowship
eligibility: Graduates and postgraduates aspiring to work in education and development sector
